reviews.review_title: before you scroll away hear me out
reviews.review_description: so a very fun aspect of the game was the mod menus but now all of them cost real money and to be fair i'm not sure if it's the same company if so they have every right to use the code but if not i mean it is kinda messed up that they copy the whole thing the only difference is mod menus now cost real money

I loved playing this game with my friends it was so fun and I would play the game very day with my friends I can’t wait for caves to come out because that was one of the best parts of the it had horror in mines and me and friends would play run around and mess with the monster BillybobVR approved 👍￼

reviews.review_title: this game is trash and the owner
reviews.review_description: So i was chilling in infection and the owner came and fly tagged everyone he think everyone's gonna glaze him no everyone said there gonna kill him and when i say OMG he bans me no wonder this game sucks and has no updates only the canyons update the owner doesn't care about us having fun like bro we know its ur game but actually were the ones judging not u buddy

I love this game so much. I was so sad that the old one got removed, but then I found this one now I’m putting it on YouTube for people to come play it. hopefully this game does not get shut down and keeps putting out updates. Maybe the beach or cloud update please make more updates. It’s really fun.

The game by itself is actually kinda good even though it's just a rip-off of gorilla tag. It has built in mod menus which is great.
 But the worst part is , i spent forty dollars on this game for a mod menu , and some of the mods don't even work.

The caves are fun they have a really nontoxic community they even have 100 player infection. I stared with 3000 shiny rock idk if that’s normal. They have city caves and forest. Soon there going to have a beach a canyons a clouds and maybe there going to add mountains. Theres also so much cosmetics in city. Theres also mod menus but they cost real money. That’s why brick tag is the best game ever.GO DOWNLOAD NOW.

I got this game when it first came out, not in 2026. And when I got it I bought mods and booted up this game because the old one got shut down, and when I started it, I didn't have my mods, and I am not paying ANOTHER $20!

 five stars

If you got your vr in the past year then you don’t know what I mean when I say brings back memories. It is because this game came out over 2 years ago and it was called the same thing. 

It was exactly the same as it is now but the canyon map was released. Then gorilla tag saw the game and saw how similar it was to their game and shut it down for copyright. Then the creators of the game made a new game with the same textures and same ￼ mechanics as brick tag but￼ called it Brick Mania.

Now that this game came out I am so happy because it is so much fun and it brough back caves and the horror monster. This game surely brings back memories.
